APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURA D. BEATON OF SHUTE, IHALY & WEINBERGER LLP, TEL. NO. 552-7272 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S Motion To Enter Consent Judgment is Granted. Order signed in open court. Prevailing party to prepare a form of judgment. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963 =302/sb

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Continued To May-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION'S Motion To Enter Consent Judgment is continued on the Court's own motion to May 14, 2015 to be heard by Judge Goldsmith due to the recusal of Judge Kahn because of his friendship with Ms. Folk. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =(302/HK)
